title: ricinocarpus lagoensis
intro: Ricinocarpus lagoensis, also known as the water caltrop, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus lagoensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
